Defines built-in array properties and routines for the JerryScript engine.

# Purpose
This C header file defines macros and constants related to the ECMAScript Array object, as part of a JavaScript engine implementation. It uses preprocessor directives to define and later undefine macros such as `OBJECT_ID`, `OBJECT_VALUE`, `NUMBER_VALUE`, and `ROUTINE`, which are used to declare properties and methods of the Array object. The file specifies the object identifier for the Array (`ECMA_BUILTIN_ID_ARRAY`), a prototype property (`LIT_MAGIC_STRING_PROTOTYPE`), a length property with a fixed value of 1, and a routine property for checking if an object is an array (`ecma_builtin_array_object_is_array`). This setup is part of the internal representation and handling of the Array object in the engine.
